description.value: Aura moderate abjuration; CL 10th; Slot head; Price 12,000 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION This soft cap helps the wearer free herself from outside influences. Once per day, when the wearer fails a saving throw against a mind-affecting effect, she can reroll the save and take the second result. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, mind blank; Cost 6,000 gp.
